description: Fix flaky patterns in E2E tests: silent fallthrough on adapter injection timeout, hardcoded sleeps that should use polling/helpers, temp dir leaks in iife-injection tests, and hardcoded FSEvents readiness delays.

userStories.title: Fix silent fallthrough in adapter injection polling in hot-reload-dynamic.e2e.ts
userStories.description: As a test infrastructure maintainer, I want the adapter injection polling loop to throw a diagnostic error on timeout, so that test failures have clear root cause messages instead of confusing downstream failures.
acceptanceCriteria: The while loop at approximately line 534 in hot-reload-dynamic.e2e.ts throws a descriptive error if the deadline is reached without adapter injection (matching the behavior of openTestAppTab in helpers.ts)
The error message includes the page URL and plugin name for diagnostics
Existing test behavior is unchanged when adapter injection succeeds within the deadline

userStories.title: Replace hardcoded 8s sleep with waitForExtensionDisconnected in tab-state-sync.e2e.ts
userStories.description: As a test infrastructure maintainer, I want the disconnection detection test to use the existing polling helper instead of a fixed 8-second sleep, so that the test is faster when disconnection is quick and more reliable when it's slow.
acceptanceCriteria: The 8-second hardcoded sleep at approximately line 316 in tab-state-sync.e2e.ts is replaced with waitForExtensionDisconnected (already imported from helpers.ts)
The timeout for waitForExtensionDisconnected is at least 15s to account for the offscreen pong timeout plus buffer

userStories.title: Fix temp dir leaks in iife-injection.e2e.ts overlapping URL pattern tests
userStories.description: As a test infrastructure maintainer, I want temp directories for extra plugins in iife-injection tests to be cleaned up even when assertions fail, preventing temp dir accumulation on CI.
acceptanceCriteria: The two overlapping URL pattern tests in iife-injection.e2e.ts clean up their tmpDir in a finally block
If any assertion fails between tmpDir creation and cleanup, the tmpDir is still removed
Existing test behavior is unchanged when tests pass

userStories.title: Replace hardcoded 500ms in-flight dispatch sleeps with polling in iife-injection.e2e.ts and dispatch-resilience.e2e.ts
userStories.description: As a test infrastructure maintainer, I want in-flight tool dispatch tests to deterministically verify the tool call reached the test server before proceeding, so that the tests are reliable under CI load.
acceptanceCriteria: In iife-injection.e2e.ts (~line 597), the fixed 500ms sleep before IIFE modification is replaced with polling the test server's invocations endpoint until the slow tool call appears
In dispatch-resilience.e2e.ts (~line 518), the fixed 500ms sleep before WebSocket replacement is replaced with polling the test server's invocations endpoint until the in-flight request appears
Both tests remain functionally correct — the IIFE modification / WebSocket replacement still happens while the tool call is in-flight
